# GPUWeb CTS static valid WGSL cases that currently roundtrip through moon_wgsl IR.
# The official corpus gate parses every extracted static valid WGSL case, then
# requires these cases to lower to IR, emit WGSL, and validate with naga.
src_webgpu_shader_validation_decl_const_spec_ts_001_f411fec927bd

src_webgpu_shader_validation_functions_restrictions_spec_ts_002_98c5c339c0bf

src_webgpu_shader_validation_functions_restrictions_spec_ts_004_fcf21c9813da

src_webgpu_shader_validation_parse_shadow_builtins_spec_ts_001_fc8d37d03fdb
